stemHtml: Which of the following statements concerning the use of airborne weather radar in the vicinity of thunderstorms is true?

options.a: The radar reflectivity echoes are much more determined by the number of reflecting particles than by the particle size.
options.b: Accurate assessment of the weather ahead of the aircraft might be hampered due to the attenuation of the radar echoes by heavy rain.
options.c: The antenna tilt shall be adjusted in order to receive the most significant echoes (generally received from an altitude of approximately 30 000 ft).
options.d: The most significant echoes will be received due to lightning discharges near the freezing level.
